name: Review Before Shell Commands
description: Review git commit and push commands to ensure they follow workflow rules

then.prompt: If this shell command involves git commit or git push: 1) Verify the commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description). 2) Ensure we're NOT pushing directly to main/master. 3) Verify no .env files or secrets are being staged. If the command is not git-related, proceed normally.
